title: Claude Fable 5 is Now BANNED?!
summary: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 model was pulled from availability three days after launch following a US government export-control directive over alleged jailbreak vulnerabilities. The presenter benchmarked Fable 5 before withdrawal and evaluates whether its 2x price premium over Opus 4.8 was justified, discussing implications for developers building on these models.
writeup: Cole Medin covers the removal of Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 from availability three days after launch, following a US government export-control directive tied to alleged jailbreak vulnerabilities. The video draws on benchmarks the presenter ran before the withdrawal and weighs whether the model's 2x price premium over Opus 4.8 was justified. The takeaways center on the practical fallout for developers building on these models when a release is pulled and on how export-control and safety concerns shaped the decision.
